sharedRules.name: Isolation
sharedRules.description: Gains extra effects against units with no allies adjacent.

sharedRules.name: Doom
sharedRules.description: Any unit affected by at least one Doom token takes 4 devil damage at the end of round 4. A unit can only clear a Doom token by slaying another unit.

characteristics.name: Upgrade Effect
characteristics.$text: May move through walls.

characteristics.name: Upgrade Effect
characteristics.$text: Beckon has a 4+ effect chance to pull 2.

characteristics.name: Upgrade Effect
characteristics.$text: Beckon inflicts 1 weak on isolated units.

constraints.message: To add more than one unit of the same type, use the selection inside the unit type.

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: When slain, does not remove Doom, and (5+) Dooms slayer.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Range 2-4

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Pull 1 spaces. Ignores line of sight.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Attack, Melee

characteristics.name: On Hit
characteristics.$text: 1 damage and (4+) Dooms unit.

characteristics.name: Upgrade Effect
characteristics.$text: Serpent’s Kiss also triggers its effects against units standing in adverse terrain

characteristics.name: Upgrade Effect
characteristics.$text: May step 1 before ACTing, or step 2 and clear a token if adjacent to a wall

characteristics.name: Upgrade Effect
characteristics.$text: Tombraiser gains +2 max range

constraints.message: To add more than one unit of the same type, use the selection inside the unit type.

characteristics.name: ARM
characteristics.$text: MAG

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Has free movement while adjacent to a wall

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Melee, range 1-2

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Create a wall in range (3+) then create adverse terrain (5+) then create adverse terrain again.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Curse, Range 2-4

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Pull 1, ignoring line of sight. If pulling a unit into a wall, pull 3 instead and the kidnapped unit can pass through walls and units during this pull.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Attack, melee

characteristics.name: On Hit
characteristics.$text: 2 damage, then against isolated units inflict 1 weak (4+) and Doom them.

characteristics.name: Upgrade Effect
characteristics.$text: Gain 2 strength if Horrendous Shriek hits an isolated foe.

characteristics.name: Upgrade Effect
characteristics.$text: When teleporting, create a space of adverse terrain in the first space vacated.

characteristics.name: Upgrade Effect
characteristics.$text: Shriek obliterates one unit in its area at 1 hp or lower.

constraints.message: To add more than one unit of the same type, use the selection inside the unit type.

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: When MOVEing a second time or more in a turn, may instead remove self from the battlefield, then place anywhere in free space in range 4

characteristics.name: ARM
characteristics.$text: MAG

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Curse, Self

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Splash (self): foes gain 1 weak. (5+): and are Doomed. Doomed units take 1 curse damage.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Attack, Melee

characteristics.name: On Hit
characteristics.$text: 2 curse damage. Effect: Against isolated units, gain 1 strength and may then MOVE again.

characteristics.name: Upgrade Effect
characteristics.$text: Tombstone gains effect (6+): adjacent foes are Doomed

characteristics.name: Upgrade Effect
characteristics.$text: If Bale Scream slays a unit, it creates a space of adverse terrain instead of a corpse.

characteristics.name: Upgrade Effect
characteristics.$text: Bale Scream pulls all units in its area 2.

constraints.message: To add more than one unit of the same type, use the selection inside the unit type.

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Abilities ignore line of sight

characteristics.name: ARM
characteristics.$text: MAG

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Line 4

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Line: 1 curse damage. Isolated or Doomed units take 1 curse damage again. May penetrate walls and does not damage walls. If this line passes through a wall, this unit gains 1 strength.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Range 2-4

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Create a wall in range and (5+) adjacent foes to the wall gain 1 weak.

characteristics.name: Upgrade Effect
characteristics.$text: Beckon Lamb has no maximum range against Doomed units

characteristics.name: Upgrade Effect
characteristics.$text: Attacks against other Tyrants cannot have their damage reduced and obliterate their targets instead of slaying them.

characteristics.name: Upgrade Effect
characteristics.$text: This unit is curseproof

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Before MOVEing, may remove and place any adjacent walls in any other free adjacent spaces.

characteristics.name: ARM
characteristics.$text: MAG

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Curse, Range 1-4, requires isolated unit

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Choose an isolated unit. That unit gains 2 weak and may no longer MOVE or step until the end of its next turn or until it’s no longer isolated.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Curse, range 2-4

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Unit gains 1 weak and is pulled 3.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Melee, Attack

characteristics.name: On Hit
characteristics.$text: Deals 1 damage, +1 for each of the following that is true about the target: Doomed, Isolated, Weak, In adverse terrain

characteristics.name: Upgrade Effect
characteristics.$text:
At the start of round 3, create a new wall in free space
anywhere for each Lithogeist still active.

characteristics.name: Upgrade Effect
characteristics.$text: Replace all instances of the word wall in Buried Alive and Tomb Bound with adverse terrain instead.

characteristics.name: Upgrade Effect
characteristics.$text: When Strangle slays a unit, create a wall in their space instead of a corpse.

characteristics.name: ARM
characteristics.$text: SUPER

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text:
The Geist is bound to thestone of Anzenmezzeron.
• It cannot MOVE or step.
• At the start of its turn, teleport it to any space adjacent to a wall.
• At the start of combat, place a wall in a free adjacent space to it.

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: If not adjacent to a wall, the geist loses all armor.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Range 2-3, Curse

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Target unit gains 1 or (5+) 2 weak. At the end of their turn, create a wall in a free adjacent space to them.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Attack, Range 1-2

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Pull 1 before making attack.

characteristics.name: On Hit
characteristics.$text: 2 damage. Against isolated units, inflicts 1 weak.

constraints.message: To add more than one unit of the same type, use the selection inside the unit type.

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: May move through walls. Foes count as isolated when adjacent to this unit unless they have two or more allies adjacent.

characteristics.name: ARM
characteristics.$text: MAG

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Attack, Range 1-2

characteristics.name: On Hit
characteristics.$text: 1 curse damage, or 2 curse damage against Doomed foes, then (Effect: 3+): foe is Doomed.

characteristics.name: When
characteristics.$text: Self or Allied Turn

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Range 1-2

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: All isolated or doomed foes in range take 1 curse damage, gain 1 weak, and this unit gains 1 strength for each of these foes.

characteristics.name: When
characteristics.$text: Own or Allied Turn.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Range 2-3

characteristics.name: Trigger
characteristics.$text: Start of turn

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Create a wall in range and inflict 1 weak on an adjacent foe to the wall.

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: When MOVEing the second time or more in a turn, can remove this unit from the battlefield and place it in any free space in range 4, then clear a token.

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: May use body block from within range 2 instead of adjacent.

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: +1D on attacks and ignores cover against Doomed units

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Curse, Range 2-4.

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Pull 2. Ignores line of sight. If the unit is an ally, may then pull another allied unit and clear a token on both allies.

characteristics.name: When
characteristics.$text: Any turn

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Curse, Range 2-4

characteristics.name: Trigger
characteristics.$text: Start of turn

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Pull unit 1 in any direction.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Self

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: MOVE with free movement, moving through walls and units. Foes passed through gain 1 weak. Doomed foes take 1 curse damage.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Curse, Range 1-3

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Unit takes 1 curse damage. Then, it gains 1 weak for every 1 hp it is missing. If it’s missing more than half its hp, it is then Doomed.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Range 1-2

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Create up to three spaces of adverse terrain in range. Units standing in adverse terrain in range take 1 piercing damage.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Melee, Attack

characteristics.name: On Hit
characteristics.$text: 1 damage. Effect: At round 4 or later, deals 4 curse damage on hit instead.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Attack, range 2-2

characteristics.name: On Hit
characteristics.$text: 1 damage. Effect: Pull all foes in range 1 space, then splash (self): 1 curse damage. Against doomed units, damage cannot be reduced in any way.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Attack, range 2-3

characteristics.name: On Hit
characteristics.$text: 1 curse damage. Effect: Cannot benefit from strength. Instead, may remove up to three weak tokens from target to increase curse damage by +1 per weak token removed.

characteristics.name: When
characteristics.$text: Foe Turn

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Curse, Range 1-4

characteristics.name: Trigger
characteristics.$text: Turn start

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: At the end of their turn, foe inflicts splash (self) 1 curse damage and 1 weak, only affecting their allies.

characteristics.name: When
characteristics.$text: Own or allied turn

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Range 1-4

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Remove self and an adjacent allied unit, then place self in free space in range, then place ally adjacent. If there is no room to place allies, return them at their original location.

characteristics.name: When
characteristics.$text: Any turn

characteristics.name: Trigger
characteristics.$text: A unit is slain

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Transfer all negative tokens to a different unit anywhere, then increase those tokens by 1.

characteristics.name: When
characteristics.$text: Own turn

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Scour the battlefield with frozen wind, pulling all foes 1 space in the same direction. Foes that would be pulled into walls or adverse terrain take 1 damage.

characteristics.name: When
characteristics.$text: Own turn

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Range 1-2

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Doom all enemy units in range. All Doomed enemy units instead take 1 curse damage, +1 per Doom token they have.
